name: freeeducationhealth-kiosk
description: FreeEducationHealth kiosk/ front-end -- browser-based waiting-room intake kiosk for clinic tablets. Walks a walk-in patient through the same chief-complaint + targeted-question flow as bot/, calls core/'s AI panel, and files the result as a review card in instanthpi/carousel's card store for the physician. Self-hosted, bring your own AI provider keys.
